patterns.name: AUTH_FLOW
patterns.description: Authentication, session management, login, logout, token, 2FA, password, SSO defects
examples: Login button does nothing on Firefox
2FA code accepted after expiry
Session persists after password change
Session timeout not enforced on shared workstation

patterns.name: DATA_VALIDATION
patterns.description: Input validation failures, boundary conditions, type checking, format enforcement
examples: Wire transfer amount field allows negative values
Beneficiary IBAN validation accepts invalid checksums
Patient ID field accepts SQL injection strings
Date picker blocks past date selection for edits

patterns.name: UI_REGRESSION
patterns.description: Visual, layout, rendering, CSS, responsive design, component display defects
examples: Mobile layout overlaps footer on small screens
Autocomplete suggestions appear behind modal
Dark mode toggle resets on page reload
Search not working correctly

patterns.name: DATA_INTEGRITY
patterns.description: Data loss, corruption, duplication, synchronisation, persistence failures
examples: Audit log missing entries after crash
Medication reconciliation duplicates entries
Transaction history pagination skips records
CSV export contains raw HTML

patterns.name: PERFORMANCE
patterns.description: Timeouts, slow response, memory leaks, infinite loading, resource exhaustion
examples: Vital signs graph freezes at 30 minutes
PDF statement generation crashes for accounts over 5 years
File upload fails for large files
Dashboard crashes on open

patterns.name: SAFETY_CRITICAL
patterns.description: Patient safety, device malfunction, alarm failures, medication errors — medtech specific
examples: Infusion pump alarm does not trigger on occlusion
Dosage calculator shows wrong result for 72.5kg patient
DICOM image loads in wrong orientation
Electronic signature not validated on discharge form

patterns.name: COMPLIANCE_REGULATORY
patterns.description: Regulatory, audit, e-signature, reporting, traceability, PSD2, IEC 62304 failures
examples: Push notification for large transaction not sent
Electronic signature not validated on discharge form
Audit log missing entries after crash

patterns.name: SECURITY
patterns.description: Security vulnerabilities, injection, bypass, privilege escalation, data exposure
examples: Patient ID field accepts SQL injection strings
Account freeze does not block outgoing API transfers
Login session persists after password change

patterns.name: INTEGRATION
patterns.description: Third-party API, external service, feed, connector, protocol failures
examples: Currency conversion rate not updated during market hours
DICOM image loads in wrong orientation from Siemens scanner
CSV export cannot be parsed by third-party analytics
